description_long: This is a cylindrical trash bin with a perforated body featuring a repeating pattern of plus-shaped cutouts, allowing for ventilation and visibility of the contents inside. The rim at the top is solid and slightly flared, providing structural reinforcement and a clean edge for handling or bag placement. The bin is constructed from a single material, likely metal, giving it a sturdy and durable appearance suitable for outdoor or public use. The open-top design makes it easy to deposit waste without the need for a lid or additional mechanisms. There are no visible handles, wheels, or labeling, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian aesthetic. The dark gray color and matte finish suggest it is designed to blend into urban environments while resisting dirt and wear.
description: A cylindrical, perforated metal trash bin with a plus-shaped cutout pattern and an open top, finished in matte dark gray. It has a sturdy, minimalist design with no visible handles, wheels, or labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plus-shaped perforations and the solid, slightly flared rim at the top.
description_view_1: Side view with the same perforated pattern and open top, no additional features visible.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to the others, highlighting the uniformity of the cutout pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view, consistent with other views, showing the continuous perforated design and open rim.
